translated: Look, I will go to that place here. Aa and the elders, and the leaders, and the children come to the town.

ref: God gave them his blessing and said: Have a lot of children! Fill the earth with people and bring it under your control. Rule over the fish in the ocean, the birds in the sky, and every animal on the earth.

translated: When they arrived there, they said, “Mother, I worked, and I ate the food there, but I did not eat the yam. I worked on the farm, in the forest, and in the town before I returned home.”

translated: God created them and said to the children, "I am now the one who sees the people come to do my work; but the name of Aawumbɔr is my name."

text: See ni mɔmɔk bui u ke, ‘Een, saanaagbiija Jakob le bi kɔnkɔni do ki choo na.’” Jakob nan dakl ke, “Nibaakan Esɔ yaa kan ipiin ngbaan kan, u ga li gee mi, aan ti yaa kan tɔb kan, u ga di cha pinn mi.”
translated: Then he said to him, "My brother Jacob, please accept this gift I have brought to you." Jacob replied, "My lord, I have already received your mercy; I was afraid you would come to harm me, but now I have seen your face, which is like seeing the face of God, and you have shown me favor."
